message.content: @startuml title Validation Tocken skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { LifeLineBorderColor #777777 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #666666 ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6 ParticipantFontColor black ParticipantPadding 25 BoxPadding 10 ArrowThickness 2 MessageAlign left } participant "RemoteServiceServlet" as RSS participant "HttpSessionCollector" as HSC participant "SysLog" as SYS participant "Validation_User" as VU ' Data Request comes from outside into RemoteServiceServlet [-] -> RSS : Data Request activate RSS RSS -> RSS : Get Session ID_client RSS -> HSC : Get Session by ID_client activate HSC HSC --> RSS : Session deactivate HSC note over RSS Validation Tockens True end note activate RSS #green RSS -> VU : Access success deactivate RSS note over RSS Validation Tockens False end note activate RSS #red RSS -> SYS #orange : Tocken Failure (Name, Time) deactivate RSS RSS --> [-] #red : Access denied deactivate RSS @enduml
